<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Bayfall Morrigan | Private Capital Management</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400;1,500&family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
:root {
  --black: #080808; --white: #f9f8f6; --off: #f2f0ec;
  --mid: #7a7670; --rule: #ccc9c2;
  --display: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  --body: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif;
}
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body { background: var(--white); color: var(--black); font-family: var(--body); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.8; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
header { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; background: var(--white); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 72px; height: 76px; }
.header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; }
.logo-img { height: 44px; width: auto; display: block; }
.header-right a { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--mid); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; padding-bottom: 2px; transition: color 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; }
.header-right a:hover { color: var(--black); border-color: var(--black); }
.hero { min-height: 100vh; background: var(--black); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 140px 72px 120px; }
.hero-eyebrow { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 52px; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s ease 0.2s forwards; }
.hero-headline { font-family: var(--display); font-size: clamp(52px, 7.5vw, 96px); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.08; color: var(--white); letter-spacing: 0.01em; max-width: 860px; margin-bottom: 44px; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s ease 0.45s forwards; }
.hero-headline em { font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; }
.hero-sub { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 17px; color: #ffffff; max-width: 480px; line-height: 1.95; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s ease 0.7s forwards; }
.hero-rule { width: 40px; height: 1px; background: #222; margin: 60px auto 0; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s ease 0.9s forwards; }
@keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(18px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.statement { background: var(--white); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; min-height: 700px; }
.statement-inner { padding: 100px 72px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; }
.statement-photo { background-size: cover; background-position: center top; background-image: url("data:image/jpeg;base64,"); -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to left, rgba(0,0,0,1) 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%); mask-image: linear-gradient(to left, rgba(0,0,0,1) 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%); }
.statement-label { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--mid); margin-bottom: 48px; }
.statement-pull { font-family: var(--display); font-size: clamp(34px, 4vw, 58px); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: var(--black); margin-bottom: 52px; padding-bottom: 52px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.statement-pull em { font-style: italic; }
.statement-body { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 64px; }
.statement-body p { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 17px; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1.95; }
.model { background: var(--black); padding: 130px 72px; }
.model-label { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 80px; }
.model-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }
.model-item { padding-right: 64px; margin-right: 64px; border-right: 1px solid #ffffff; }
.model-item:last-child { border-right: none; padding-right: 0; margin-right: 0; }
.model-number { font-family: var(--display); font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.model-heading { font-family: var(--display); font-size: 27px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 20px; }
.model-text { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 16px; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1.9; }
.structures { padding: 140px 72px; background: var(--off); border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.structures-header { margin-bottom: 80px; padding-bottom: 56px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.6fr; gap: 120px; align-items: end; }
.section-label { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--mid); margin-bottom: 28px; }
.structures-heading { font-family: var(--display); font-size: clamp(30px, 3vw, 44px); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
.structures-note { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 16px; color: #000000; line-height: 1.95; }
.structures-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 32px; }
.structure-card { background: var(--white); padding: 60px 56px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); transition: border-color 0.3s; }
.structure-card:hover { border-color: #000000; }
.structure-tag { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--mid); margin-bottom: 28px; }
.structure-name { font-family: var(--display); font-size: 32px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 32px; }
.structure-rule { width: 32px; height: 1px; background: var(--rule); margin-bottom: 32px; }
.structure-text { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 16px; color: #000000; line-height: 1.9; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.structure-text:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.contact { background: var(--black); padding: 120px 72px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 120px; align-items: start; }
.contact-label { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 40px; }
.contact-heading { font-family: var(--display); font-size: clamp(32px, 3.5vw, 52px); font-weight: 300; color: var(--white); line-height: 1.12; margin-bottom: 60px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
.contact-heading em { font-style: italic; }
.contact-info-line { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.contact-info-value { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 17px; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 36px; }
.form-group { margin-bottom: 34px; }
.form-label { display: block; font-family: var(--body); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.form-input, .form-textarea { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #ffffff; padding: 10px 0; font-family: var(--body); font-size: 17px; color: var(--white); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.25s; border-radius: 0; -webkit-appearance: none; }
.form-input:focus, .form-textarea:focus { border-bottom-color: #ffffff; }
.form-input::placeholder, .form-textarea::placeholder { color: #ffffff; }
.form-textarea { resize: none; height: 96px; }
.form-submit { margin-top: 44px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #ffffff; padding: 16px 52px; font-family: var(--body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.25s, color 0.25s; }
.form-submit:hover { border-color: #ffffff; color: var(--white); }
.footer-bar { background: #050505; border-top: 1px solid #ffffff; padding: 24px 72px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
.footer-name { font-family: var(--display); font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; }
.footer-note { font-family: var(--body); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #ffffff; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  header { padding: 0 28px; }
  .hero { padding: 110px 28px 90px; }
  .statement { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .statement-inner { padding: 72px 28px; }
  .statement-photo { display: none; }
  .statement-body { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .model { padding: 90px 28px; }
  .model-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 52px; }
  .model-item { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #ffffff; padding: 0 0 52px; margin: 0; }
  .model-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; padding-bottom: 0; }
  .structures { padding: 90px 28px; }
  .structures-header { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
  .structures-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .structure-card { padding: 40px 28px; }
  .contact { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 60px; padding: 90px 28px; }
  .footer-bar { padding: 20px 28px; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header>
  <div class="header-left">
    <img class="logo-img" src="LOGOPNG.png" alt="Bayfall Morrigan">
  </div>
  <div class="header-right">
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
</header>

<section class="hero">
  <p class="hero-eyebrow">BAYFALL MORRIGAN &nbsp;&mdash;&nbsp; Private Capital Management</p>
  <h1 class="hero-headline">Private lending.<br><em>Fixed terms.</em></h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Offering fixed-term account structures to private lenders.</p>
  <div class="hero-rule"></div>
</section>

<section class="statement">
  <div class="statement-inner">
    <p class="statement-label">The Firm</p>
    <h2 class="statement-pull">Fixed-term account structures for private lenders.<br><em>Built by everyday people, for everyday people.</em></h2>
    <div class="statement-body">
      <p>
    </div>Bayfall Morrigan is a private capital management firm that builds proprietary cash management systems designed to put private lenders in control of unique opportunities. These systems are powered by capital we acquire from high-yield fixed-term accounts, giving everyday investors access to strategies typically reserved for institutions. With a history of consistently outperforming our commitments, our approach prioritizes reliability, transparency, and long-term results.</p>
  </div>
  <img src="WEBSITEPHOTOHERE.jpg" alt="Bayfall Morrigan" style="width: 100%; max-width: 650px; float: right; margin-left: 340px; display: block; margin-bottom: -1px;">
</section>

<section class="model">
  <p class="model-label">The Model</p>
  <div class="model-grid">
    <div class="model-item">
      <p class="model-number">01</p>
      <h3 class="model-heading">Fixed-Term Account Structures</h3>
      <p class="model-text">Capital enters the firm through private high-yield loan agreements. Each agreement specifies a principal amount, a term length, and a fixed yield to be returned at maturity. All terms are established at execution and do not move.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="model-item">
      <p class="model-number">02</p>
      <h3 class="model-heading">Proprietary Cash Management</h3>
      <p class="model-text">Lender capital is deployed into proprietary cash management systems developed and operated internally. These systems are designed to generate output in excess of contractual obligations across a defined range of operating conditions.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="model-item">
      <p class="model-number">03</p>
      <h3 class="model-heading">Spread-Based Economics</h3>
      <p class="model-text">Revenue is the spread between what the proprietary systems produce and the fixed cost of lender capital. Contractual yields are priced against modeled worst-case system outcomes, not peak performance.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="structures">
  <div class="structures-header">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">Lending Structures</p>
      <h2 class="structures-heading">Two structures.<br>One principle.</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="structures-note">Bayfall Morrigan offers two fixed-term account structures. Both are defined entirely at execution — the term, the yield, and the payout are established before capital is ever deployed. The structure that applies depends on the capital available at the time of entry.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="structures-grid">
    <div class="structure-card">
      <p class="structure-tag">Structure 01</p>
      <h3 class="structure-name">Standard Private<br>High-Yield Loan</h3>
      <div class="structure-rule"></div>
      <p class="structure-text">The full principal is committed at inception. The agreement enters immediately into a fixed-term account structure with a contractual yield compounded monthly for the duration of the selected term.</p>
      <p class="structure-text">Terms run 3, 6, or 12 months. A one-time origination fee is deducted upfront before yield begins to accrue. The contract terms are established at execution and do not change.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="structure-card">
      <p class="structure-tag">Structure 02</p>
      <h3 class="structure-name">Account<br>Build-Up Program</h3>
      <div class="structure-rule"></div>
      <p class="structure-text">For those whose intended allocation exceeds what is currently available. A target balance is established and funded through weekly contributions over a defined accumulation period. Contributions earn a yield throughout, compounded monthly and added to the balance.</p>
      <p class="structure-text">Once the target balance is reached, the account transitions automatically into a pre-agreed standard private high-yield loan. The terms of that contract are set before accumulation begins. Longer accumulation periods produce higher final yields.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="contact" id="contact">
  <div>
    <p class="contact-label">Get in Touch</p>
    <h2 class="contact-heading">Inquiries are<br><em>handled directly.</em></h2>
    <div>
      <p class="contact-info-line">Email</p>
      <p class="contact-info-value"><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="75161a1b011416013517140c13141919181a07071c12141b5b161a18">[email&#160;protected]</a></p>
      <p class="contact-info-line">Based In</p>
      <p class="contact-info-value">United States</p>
      <p class="contact-info-line">Availability</p>
      <p class="contact-info-value">By referral and direct inquiry</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <form>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Full Name</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Your name">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Contact</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Email or phone">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Message</label>
        <textarea class="form-textarea" placeholder="How can we help you"></textarea>
      </div>
      <button type="submit" class="form-submit">Submit Inquiry</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="footer-bar">
  <span class="footer-name">Bayfall Morrigan</span>
  <span class="footer-note">Private Capital Management &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Est. 2024</span>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
